name: wayfinder
description: The wayfinder planning method as a Claude Code plugin: map big foggy efforts as investigation tickets under .plan/, one decision per session.

plugins.name: wayfinder
plugins.description: Plan huge, foggy efforts as a shared map of investigation tickets (.plan/), plus the skills the method leans on. Original skills by Matt Pocock (github.com/mattpocock/skills). The repo also ships the read-only map viewer binary.
